extension.description: Orion v3.3.0 - Complete media addon with 25+ torrent scrapers including Russian trackers (Rutor, RuTracker, Kinozal, NNM-Club), TorrServer integration, plus Torrentio, PirateBay, YTS, EZTV, 1337x, Knaben, TorrentGalaxy, SolidTorrents, BTDig, LimeTorrents, Nyaa, Comet, Torlock, GloDLS, MagnetDL, KickAss, MediaFusion, Jackettio, Orionoid. Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, Trakt, ResolveURL 5.1.193.
extension.news: [3.3.1] Fixed repository zip download paths (404 errors). Fixed debrid token storage using file-based persistence. Improved error messages for debrid authorization. Fixed ResolveURL installation from repo.
